title: Xiaomi Mi
description: An art project for Xiaomi Mi to accompany the Mi 10T lineup launch. Two artists — Ilya Slak and Alexey Barhan — developed original designs on Off-White sneakers, while Street Wave studio served as the production facility and hand-painted all 50 pairs.

details.task: Produce an art project for Xiaomi Mi for the Mi 10T lineup launch — a series of 50 custom Off-White sneakers with original artwork by two artists.
details.solution: Artists Ilya Slak and Alexey Barhan created two unique designs inspired by the Mi 10T camera capabilities. Street Wave studio served as the production base, transferring the concepts onto Off-White sneakers and hand-painting all 50 pairs.
details.result: The result was an art project at the intersection of technology and street culture that amplified the product launch and turned sneakers into collectible art objects.
